name: PowerShell Code Execution via SyncAppvPublishingServer
description: Detects the execution of arbitrary PowerShell commands via SyncAppvPublishingServer.vbs, a technique used by adversaries to bypass security restrictions.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that executed the VBScript (e.g., wscript.exe or cscript.exe).

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the process that executed the VBScript.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute the SyncAppvPublishingServer.vbs script, containing the semicolon (;) indicating chained commands or PowerShell.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the script was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
